title: heliophila nubigena
intro: Heliophila nubigena, also known as the alpine rock jet or alpine rock rocket, is a small, annual plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of heliophila nubigena include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be infused in hot water to make a tea that is often used to treat respiratory problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
